tools.name: search
tools.description:
Use this when the user wants to find UK properties for sale, especially with lifestyle requirements like travel time to work, good schools, quiet areas, energy efficiency, period features, or specific views. Supports filters unavailable elsewhere: commute time (walk/cycle/drive/transit), school catchments with Ofsted ratings, EPC ratings, noise avoidance, proximity to parks/playgrounds, interior features (high ceilings, fireplaces, sash windows), kitchen styles, architectural period, renovation potential, garden direction, price per sqft, and pre-market properties.

Do NOT use for: rentals, non-UK properties, commercial property, market advice, or mortgage questions.
